terrafix.title: Terrafix
terrafix.desc: A factory game where plants fight machines. Developed in 48 hours.

details.heroDescription: Planetary Restoration Reverse-Factorio. Developed during the 48-hour Game Jam 2025. Harness the power of nature to heal and recover dying worlds occupied by machines.

stack.label: THE STACK
stack.title: Technical Foundation
stack.description: The core technologies and methodologies that powered Terrafix.

unreal.title: Unreal Engine
unreal.desc: Development with C++ for high-performance systems and Blueprints for rapid game mechanics iteration.

perforce.title: Perforce
perforce.desc: Team collaboration and versioning of complex assets in a real-time development environment.

figma.title: Figma
figma.desc: UI/UX prototyping and visual conceptualization of the organic user interface.

shaders.title: Custom Shaders
shaders.desc: Custom HLSL shaders for procedural terrain healing and atmospheric reclamation effects.

overview.title: Overview
overview.p1: Terrafix redefines the Factorio principle: instead of gray factories, you use the power of nature. As a small, renegade robot, you build a complex, plant-based network based on a specially developed Custom Node System.
overview.p2: Each plant acts as a living module with individual inputs and outputs that must be strategically linked to transform resources and clean the atmosphere.

growth.title: Node-based Growth
growth.desc: Linking plant structures for automated resource flows and energy networks.

defense.title: Defense & Companions
defense.desc: Defending against enemy waves with the help of a loyal companion.

visual.title: Visual Reclamation
visual.desc: Custom HLSL shaders visualize mechanical corrosion giving way to blooming life.

research.title: Research Table
research.desc: Strategic development of new plants through found mechanical and organic artifacts.

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.desc: I'm currently crafting high-performance, developer-focused open source tools. Follow my GitHub for updates on upcoming releases.
